oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Evaluation of arrival viral respiratory vaccine treatment on health outcomes in low- to moderate-risk feedlot steers
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Theurer, M.E.
Fox, J.T.
McCarty, T.M.
Newberry, J.R.
Payot, F.
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: Respiratory viral vaccines are used for prevention of bovine re­spiratory disease (BRD). A total of 6,260 beef steers were used to compare the health outcomes of different arrival vaccine pro­grams. Compared were BOVIGENTM Platinum 3 Vaccine (P3), BO­VIGEN™ Platinum 5 Vaccine (P5), and Bovi-Shield GOLD® 5 (B5).
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; Vol. 58 No. 2 (2025): 2025 AABP Annual Conference Proceedings; 227
oai_dc:dc.dc:rights: Copyright (c) 2026 American Association of Bovine Practitioners
